STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_12 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: Five-digit numeric value, which can include leading zeros, or null (if there is no crosswalk from the SSA 
code to the FIPS code) 

COMMENT: The first two digits specify the state; the last 3 digits specify the county.
